name: STI India Limited
summary: STI India Limited manufactures and sells spun yarns and knitted grey fabrics in India. Its products include organic cotton and blended, BCI cotton, fairtrade cotton, viscose and blended, linen blended, EliTwist, TFO, neppy, slub, core spun, special fiber, high twist, and fancy yarns; and single jersey, rib, pique, 3-thread fleece, and fancy knitted fabrics. The company was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Indore, India. STI India Limited is a subsidiary of Bombay Rayon Fashions Limited.
